market_context.theme: AVGO Q2 FY2026 guidance miss: AI chip Q3 guide $16B vs $17.2B expected → -13.36% stock, dragged entire chip complex; sector rotation out of crowded AI semis into blue-chip/defensive (Dow record); GOOGL +4% broke losing streak; INTC +4.43% rotation beneficiary; Cathie Wood selling AMD, buying GOOGL/META/Alibaba

fom_component_notes.confidence: analyst assessment [0,1] based on analyst consensus, thesis quality, macro alignment
fom_component_notes.sizing_sigma_norm: day_range% / 5% capped at 1.0 (proxy for realized volatility opportunity)
fom_component_notes.recent_hit_rate: 0.50 for all tickers on Day 1 (no prior recommendations)
fom_component_notes.news_momentum: qualitative [0,1] from news quality: catalysts, sentiment, flow signals

prior_backtest.note: First run — no prior recommendations to backtest. Hit rate = N/A.

NVDA.thesis: AI GPU secular demand intact; analyst PT $298 vs current $216 = 38% upside; chip sector sold off on AVGO guidance miss creating entry dip; Buy consensus

AAPL.thesis: Steady consumer franchise; AI integration (Apple Intelligence) upcoming; low volatility, low urgency

TSLA.thesis: EV + energy + Optimus robotics + FSD AI; macro Iran war headline risk adds uncertainty; no strong directional conviction

MSFT.thesis: Azure AI + Copilot monetization; wide day range creates opportunity; non-chip sector rotation beneficiary

AMD.thesis: MI300X competitive with NVDA; Cathie Wood selling AMD (negative institutional signal); chip sector headwind; SMCI AMD Helios connection is positive for AMD design wins but not immediate stock catalyst

GOOGL.thesis: Broke multi-day losing streak on June 4 (+4%); Cathie Wood buying; Gemini AI search integration monetization; Cloud diversification vs AWS; positive momentum catalyst

META.thesis: Cathie Wood buying; Llama AI + ad-tech monetization; Reality Labs long-term optionality; dropped from tier due to low intraday volatility = limited immediate opportunity

AMZN.thesis: AWS + Bedrock AI services + retail + logistics; steady compounder; dropped from tier due to low intraday signal

AVGO.thesis: Potential mean-reversion candidate after -13.36% guidance-miss selloff; AI chip revenue still +143% YoY; wait 1-2 sessions for capitulation / accumulation signals before entry; near-term negative

SMCI.thesis: AMD Helios platform launch + $2B Gorilla Technology deal; +10.88% weekly momentum; AI server rack infrastructure beneficiary; volatile (7% intraday range) — size appropriately

PLTR.thesis: 85% YoY revenue growth; strong gov + enterprise AI analytics (AIP platform); defense AI budget tailwind; 52-wk high $207 = 44% above current, meaningful room; highest-FOM ticker on Day 1

TSM.thesis: AI demand supply gap confirmed by CEO C.C. Wei; $165B US capacity investment; dividend ex-date Jun 11 (near-term positive); Strong Buy consensus PT $468 vs $437; AVGO selloff dragged it -2.24% creating entry opportunity

ARM.thesis: AI inference royalty uplift; SMCI/AMD architectural connection; +2.26% positive on a chip-down day = relative strength signal; IP royalty model insulated from fab capex cycle

QCOM.thesis: Huge 9% intraday range signals significant uncertainty; chip sector headwind; edge AI / automotive AI long-term optionality; WATCH rather than LONG until direction clarifies

INTC.thesis: +4.43% on sector rotation (not fundamental improvement); Intel turnaround still uncertain; watch for sustained rotation thesis vs fade
